topic.what: Agentic multi-component LLM workflow for automated security alert investigation using structured SQL queries over Suricata logs and grep-based text search
topic.how: Three-stage LLM pipeline (Investigator, Summary, Incident Verdict) with iterative investigation loop, constrained tool access, and structured query execution
topic.why_matters: Addresses critical alert fatigue in SOCs by automating early-stage alert triage, reducing manual workload while maintaining high accuracy in detecting true positives (93% avg)

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of correctly classified alerts (malicious as malicious, benign as benign)
characteristics.vs_baseline: 0% accuracy without workflow vs 93% with workflow on malicious subset
characteristics.evidence: Table III: GPT-5-mini 100%, Qwen3 95%, Claude 3 Haiku 94%, Gemma 81% on malicious; Claude 89%, Qwen3 85%, Gemma 52% on benign
characteristics.context: 100 runs per model per subset; baseline achieved 0% on malicious subset across all models

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of benign alerts incorrectly classified as malicious
characteristics.evidence: Only 2 out of 400 workflow runs on benign subset had malicious verdicts
characteristics.context: Across all models and 100 runs each

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of verdicts classified as uncertain requiring manual review
characteristics.vs_baseline: Increases from baseline due to conservative approach
characteristics.evidence: Table IV: GPT-5-mini 98% uncertain on benign, Gemma 37% iterations on malicious
characteristics.context: Conservative approach prioritizes avoiding false negatives over minimizing uncertainty

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of runs requiring additional investigation loop iteration
characteristics.evidence: Table IV shows GPT-5-mini required iterations in 98% of benign runs vs 0% for Qwen3
characteristics.context: Indicates model-specific behavioral differences in decision-making style

characteristics.evidence: 100 runs cost less than $10 USD for API models (GPT-5-mini, Claude 3 Haiku)
characteristics.context: Local models (Qwen3, Gemma) run in <1 hour on 4090 GPU

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of planned queries that executed without syntax errors
characteristics.evidence: Execution step includes guardrails: syntax validation, parameterized queries, time-bounded SQL
characteristics.context: Guardrails prevent SQL injection and unsafe operations
